item.title: 三星 2655 万亿、SK 2100 万亿，两大芯片巨头公布韩国本土扩产计划
item.guid: 三星-2655-万亿、SK-2100-万亿，两大芯片巨头公布韩国本土扩产计划
item.description:
据韩联社报道，三星电子与 SK 海力士昨日在韩国总统李在明主持的青瓦台「大韩民国大飞跃三大超级项目国民报告会」上，分别公布了未来十年在韩国本土的投资计划，两集团董事长亲赴现场。

  • 三星集团：总投资额 2655 万亿韩元，其中首都圈半导体集群获 2030 万亿韩元，湖南、忠清、岭南等非首都圈地区合计 625 万亿韩元；
  • SK 集团：总投资额约 2100 万亿韩元，其中 AI 数据中心项目约 1000 万亿韩元，半导体供应扩展项目约 1100 万亿韩元。

This report also disclosed supporting government policies: Industry Minister Kim Jeong-kwan stated that companies would be encouraged to invest a total of 800 trillion Korean Won in the southwestern region to build four memory wafer fabs, while the Chungcheong region would receive an additional 81 trillion Korean Won to establish an advanced packaging center. The specific timelines for the implementation of each project have not yet been fully disclosed. 本次报告会同步披露了政府配套政策：产业部长金正宽表示，将推动企业在西南地区合计投资 800 万亿韩元、建设四座存储晶圆厂，忠清地区另获 81 万亿韩元用于打造先进封装中心。各项目的具体落地时间表尚未完整披露。

item.title: Codex 配套外设官宣，7 月 15 日发布
item.guid: Codex-配套外设官宣，7-月-15-日发布
item.description:
Today, OpenAI released a preview video on X, announcing the launch of a hardware device designed to work with Codex on July 15th, with the accompanying text "Your favorite Codex shortcuts are about to get an upgrade." 今天，OpenAI 在 X 发布预告视频，宣布将于 7 月 15 日推出一款与 Codex 配合使用的硬件设备，并附文「你最喜欢的 Codex 快捷键即将升级」。

The video shows that the device is jointly launched by OpenAI and peripheral manufacturer Work Louder. Work Louder primarily produces mechanical keyboards and macro control boards, and its products support user-defined keys, knobs, and toggles, which can be used with various software. 视频显示，该设备由 OpenAI 与外设厂商 Work Louder 联合推出。Work Louder 主要生产机械键盘和宏控制板，其产品支持用户自定义按键、旋钮和拨杆，可与不同软件搭配使用。

The device outline appearing in the preview video is similar to Work Louder's Creator Micro 2 product—the latter is equipped with 13 mechanical switches, a joystick, and a touch sensor, allowing users to assign custom shortcuts for various applications. 预告视频中出现的设备轮廓与 Work Louder 旗下产品 Creator Micro 2 相近——后者配备 13 个机械轴、一个摇杆和一个触控传感器，用户可为各类应用程序分配自定义快捷键。

item.title: DeepSeek V4 正式版上线，工作时段涨价一倍
item.guid: DeepSeek-V4-正式版上线，工作时段涨价一倍
item.description:
According to Blue Whale News, DeepSeek sent an email to API users yesterday, announcing that the official V4 version is planned to launch in mid-July, simultaneously introducing a peak-valley pricing mechanism where API prices during peak hours will be adjusted to twice the normal rate. Multiple developers have confirmed receiving this email. 据蓝鲸新闻，DeepSeek 昨日向 API 用户发送邮件，宣布 V4 正式版计划于 7 月中旬上线，并同步引入峰谷定价机制，高峰时段 API 价格调整为平时的 2 倍。多位开发者已确认收到该邮件。

Peak hours are set daily from 9:00–12:00 and 14:00–18:00 Beijing time, with specific pricing as follows: 高峰时段定为每日北京时间 9:00–12:00 和 14:00–18:00，具体定价如下：

    V4 Pro Peak: Cache hit input 0.05 yuan / million tokens, cache miss input 6 yuan, output 12 yuan;

    V4 Pro Normal: Cache hit input 0.025 yuan, cache miss input 3 yuan, output 6 yuan;

    V4 Flash Peak: Cache hit input 0.04 yuan, cache miss input 2 yuan, output 4 yuan;

    V4 Flash Normal: Cache hit input 0.02 yuan, cache miss input 1 yuan, output 2 yuan.

Prices during off-peak hours remain unchanged from current levels. The official statement indicates that this move aims to more reasonably allocate computing resources and improve service stability. 非高峰时段价格维持现行水平不变。官方表示，此举旨在更合理地分配算力资源、提升服务稳定性。

item.title: Switch2 港版官宣涨价
item.guid: Switch2-港版官宣涨价
item.description:
Nintendo (Hong Kong) Limited yesterday released an official announcement, declaring a proposed price adjustment for the Nintendo Switch 2, stating that the price of the Hong Kong version console will increase due to changes in the global market environment. 任天堂（香港）有限公司昨日发布官方公告，宣布 Nintendo Switch 2 建议售价调整方案，受全球市场环境变动影响，港版主机价格将迎来上调。

The announcement states that the current suggested retail price for the Switch 2 Hong Kong version is HKD 3450, and starting from September 1, 2026, the official suggested retail price will change to HKD 3700, a single price increase of HKD 250. 公告表示，当前 Switch 2 港版建议售价为 3450 港币，自 2026 年 9 月 1 日起，官方建议零售价变更为 3700 港币，单次涨价幅度达 250 港币。

item.title: 豆包回应「内测社交功能」传闻：没有相关计划
item.guid: 豆包回应「内测社交功能」传闻：没有相关计划
item.description:
According to The Paper, in response to recent rumors that "Doubao large model is internally testing social functions," a relevant person in charge at Doubao responded that Doubao has no plans for the social functions mentioned in the rumors. 据澎湃新闻报道，针对近期「豆包大模型正在内测社交功能」的传闻，豆包相关负责人回应称，豆包没有传闻所说的社交功能计划。

The person in charge also stated that in enterprise office scenarios, Doubao and Feishu have some collaborative attempts, and future cooperation will be closer. 该负责人同时表示，在企业办公场景，豆包与飞书有一些协同尝试，未来合作会更紧密。

item.title: 丰田 5 月全球销量同比降 7.2%，中国市场跌幅达 31.7%
item.guid: 丰田-5-月全球销量同比降-7.2%，中国市场跌幅达-31.7%
item.description:
Toyota Motor yesterday released its May 2026 sales performance. Data shows that Toyota (including Lexus) global sales in May were 834,279 units, a year-on-year decrease of 7.2%, marking the fourth consecutive month of year-on-year decline in Toyota's global sales. 丰田汽车昨日发布 2026 年 5 月销售业绩。数据显示，丰田（含雷克萨斯）5 月全球销量为 834,279 辆，同比下降 7.2%，这也是丰田全球销量连续第 4 个月同比下滑。

The Chinese market was the biggest drag on this performance. Sales in China in May were 102,299 units, a year-on-year decrease of 31.7%, which Toyota attributed to "the continued severe market environment, including rising oil prices." In the first five months of this year, Toyota's cumulative sales in China were 579,419 units, with the year-on-year decline widening to approximately 14.8%. 中国市场是此次业绩的最大拖累。5 月在华销量为 102,299 辆，同比下降 31.7%，丰田将其归因于「包括油价上涨在内的市场环境持续严峻」。今年前 5 个月，丰田在中国累计销量 579,419 辆，同比降幅扩大至约 14.8%。

In contrast, the Japanese market saw sales of 156,639 units in May, a year-on-year increase of 6.5%, driven by the new RAV4 and new bZ4X. The North American and European markets were largely flat overall, while the Indian market grew by approximately 15.3% year-on-year, continuing its growth momentum. 相比之下，日本市场 5 月销量 156,639 辆，同比增长 6.5%，受新款 RAV4 和新款 bZ4X 拉动。北美和欧洲市场整体接近持平，印度市场同比增长约 15.3%，延续增长势头。

In terms of electrification, Toyota's global sales of electric vehicles (including PHEV, HEV, and fuel cell vehicles) in May were 467,584 units, a year-on-year increase of 10.2%, accounting for approximately 56% of total global sales; however, electric vehicle sales in the Chinese market decreased by 10.9% year-on-year, also showing pressure. 电动化方面，丰田 5 月全球电动汽车（含插混、油混、燃料电池）销量 467,584 辆，同比增长 10.2%，占全球总销量比例约 56%；但中国市场电动汽车销量同比下降 10.9%，表现同样承压。

item.title: 首个联合国自动驾驶系统全球技术法规获批发布
item.guid: 首个联合国自动驾驶系统全球技术法规获批发布
item.description:
According to news from MIIT Micro-Report, the 199th plenary meeting of the United Nations World Forum for Harmonization of Vehicle Regulations (UN/WP.29) was held in Geneva from June 22nd to 26th. The United Nations Global Technical Regulation on Autonomous Driving Systems (ADS GTR), jointly led by China, the European Union, the United Kingdom, the United States, Canada, and Japan, has been approved by a vote of all contracting parties. 据工信微报消息，联合国世界车辆法规协调组织（UN/WP.29）第 199 次全体会议 6 月 22 日至 26 日在日内瓦召开，由中国、欧盟、英国、美国、加拿大和日本共同牵头制定的联合国自动驾驶系统全球技术法规 ADS GTR 已经全体缔约方投票表决通过。

ADS GTR 明确了自动驾驶系统产品核心技术指标，并提出制造商层面的要求及审核、评估方法，形成覆盖产品全生命周期的法规框架。中国自 2019 年起先后担任联合国自动驾驶与网联车辆工作组副主席国和自动驾驶系统工作小组联合主席国。

工信部称，后续将继续参与智能网联汽车国际标准法规制修订与协调，加快国内强制性国家标准发布实施，并推进道路测试示范、「车路云一体化」应用试点、生产准入和上路通行试点。

item.title: 蔚来回应 ES9 高压水枪洗车掉漆：超出限定工况会造成物理损伤
item.guid: 蔚来回应-ES9-高压水枪洗车掉漆：超出限定工况会造成物理损伤
item.description:
近期有蔚来 ES9 车主称，使用商业高压水枪近距离冲洗前保险杠污渍后，车辆表层车漆成片脱落、露出底层基材。昨日，蔚来官方账号「蔚来小喇叭」发布《关于高压水枪洗车的小提醒》，称公司已与该车主沟通，并对现场情况作出解释。

蔚来称，ES9 前保险杠上部注塑件由行业头部供应商生产，车漆厚度、漆膜附着力和抗物理冲击性能分别参考 ISO 2808、ISO 16925:2021、SAE J400-2002 等标准验证；生产环节每月对各车型各颜色进行划格检测与高压冲水检测。

蔚来把本次问题归因为超出设计工况的高压清洗。其说明称，常见商用高压水枪在喷口距离缩短至 200mm 以内时，冲击力可较 500mm 距离提升数倍，局部压强容易超过 100bar；ES9 用户手册建议喷射距离保持在 500mm 以上、压强控制在 100bar 以下、最高温度 60°C。

item.title: Momenta 赴港上市，奔驰押注
item.guid: Momenta-赴港上市，奔驰押注
item.description:
据港交所披露文件，自动驾驶技术公司 Momenta 昨日启动香港 IPO 招股，招股期至 7 月 3 日，计划于 7 月 8 日在港交所主板挂牌，股票代码「06880.HK」。

本次发行价定为每股 295.6 港元，全球发售约 1993.83 万股，募资规模约 58.9 亿港元（约合 7.511 亿美元），另设 15% 超额配股权，由中金公司、德意志银行联席保荐。

此次 IPO 引入 14 家基石投资者，合计认购约 3.76 亿美元，占全球发售股份约 49.95%。GIC 与富达国际各以 1 亿美元领投；产业方面，梅赛德斯-奔驰认购 2500 万美元，比亚迪认购 1500 万美元；此外贝莱德旗下基金、橡树资本、博裕资本、华夏基金、太平洋保险等机构亦参与认购。

募集资金方面，约 60% 将投向核心技术研发及 AI 算力建设，约 20% 用于 Robotaxi 服务商业化，约 10% 用于量产车解决方案开发，其余约 10% 用于营运资金及一般企业用途。

item.title: 北京太空算力创新中心揭牌成立
item.guid: 北京太空算力创新中心揭牌成立
item.description:
据《科创板日报》报道，北京太空算力创新中心昨日在北京海淀中关村举行的全球数字经济大会太空算力论坛上揭牌成立。

该中心采用「公司 + 联盟」双轮驱动模式，运营主体为北京天算星联科技有限公司。报道提到，创新中心承担四类核心职能：

  • 组织星载 AI 芯片、太空大模型等共性技术攻关；
  • 牵引天地一体算力网络和在轨智能处理等场景验证；
  • 推动标准、评测和应用生态建设；
  • 连接产业链上下游资源。

item.title: 💡 OpenAI Codex 负责人：AI 能生成设计，但它还不懂品味
item.guid: 💡-OpenAI-Codex-负责人：AI-能生成设计，但它还不懂品味
item.description:
据《商业内幕》报道，OpenAI Codex 负责人 Andrew Ambrosino 近日在播客节目《Lenny‘s Podcast》中坦言，AI 在创意设计领域的能力仍存在明显短板——设计的好坏比代码能否运行更难量化，这使得用于训练模型「什么是好设计」的反馈回路难以建立。

设计比软件更难评分，构建一个能训练模型辨别好坏设计的循环，比判断代码能不能跑起来要繁琐得多。

Figma CEO Dylan Field 此前也在播客《Hard Fork》中指出，AI 模型基于「数据分布」进行训练，产出的设计结果往往落在「平均水平」区间，缺乏让人眼前一亮的创造性。这一特质决定了 AI 在审美判断和设计品味上的先天局限。

Ambrosino 最后以一句话作结：「先为人类大脑鼓掌吧。」

item.title: 不用开颅，Meta 新脑机接口能实时解码句子
item.guid: 不用开颅，Meta-新脑机接口能实时解码句子
item.description:
Meta 今日发布 Brain2Qwerty v2，同步宣布 v1 研究成果正式发表于《自然·神经科学》。v2 是目前性能最强的非侵入式脑机接口实时句子解码系统，平均单词准确率达 61%，最佳被试可达 78%，而此前非侵入式方法的单词准确率仅为 8%。

v2 training data comes from 9 volunteers, each wearing magnetoencephalography (MEG) equipment to record 10 hours of typing content, totaling approximately 22,000 sentences. The system uses end-to-end deep learning to process raw brain signals and introduces semantic context by fine-tuning large language models. v2 训练数据来自 9 名志愿者，每人佩戴脑磁图（MEG）设备录制 10 小时打字内容，共约 22,000 个句子。系统采用端到端深度学习处理原始脑信号，并通过微调大语言模型引入语义上下文。

The study also found that decoding accuracy grows logarithmically with data volume, meaning that simply expanding the data is expected to continue narrowing the gap with invasive methods. 研究还发现，解码准确率随数据量呈对数线性增长，意味着单靠扩大数据有望继续缩小与侵入式方法的差距。

Meta has open-sourced all v1 and v2 training code, and partner BCBL has simultaneously opened the v1 dataset. Limited by the large size, high cost, and reliance on magnetically shielded rooms for MEG equipment, this technology is currently still confined to laboratory environments, and its effectiveness in patients with brain injuries remains to be verified. Meta 已开源 v1 和 v2 全部训练代码，合作方 BCBL 同步开放 v1 数据集。受限于 MEG 设备体积庞大、造价高昂且依赖磁屏蔽房间，该技术目前仍局限于实验室环境，能否在脑损伤患者群体中复现效果也有待验证。

item.title: 小鹏 MONA L03 中国首秀定档 7 月 2 日
item.guid: 小鹏-MONA-L03-中国首秀定档-7-月-2-日
item.description:
Xpeng MONA L03's China debut is scheduled for July 2nd at 19:00 in Beijing. He Xiaopeng stated that this car is 'the first smart and stylish SUV for young people,' and it will be launched in Europe after its China debut. 小鹏 MONA L03 中国首秀定档 7 月 2 日 19:00 在北京举行。何小鹏称，这款车是「年轻人的第一台智能时尚 SUV」，中国首秀后还将在欧洲发布上市。

Public information shows that the Xpeng MONA L03 is a pure electric SUV, offering three range versions: 515km, 550km, and 625km. Its exterior continues the youthful design language of the MONA series. The car also announced 23 expansion interfaces, covering the roof, rear, interior storage, and camping-related accessories. 公开信息显示，小鹏 MONA L03 为纯电 SUV，提供 515km、550km 和 625km 三种续航版本，外观延续 MONA 系列偏年轻化的设计语言。该车还公布了 23 处拓展接口，覆盖车顶、车尾、车内储物和露营相关附件。

item.title: 199 元，神牛透明取景相机 C100 发布
item.guid: 199-元，神牛透明取景相机-C100-发布
item.description:
Godox released the C100 transparent viewfinder camera, priced at 199 yuan. The new product features a smart transparent display, focusing on low price, lightweight design, and visual shooting. 神牛发布透明取景相机 C100，定价 199 元。新品配备智能透明显示屏，主打低价、轻量和可视化拍摄。

From a product positioning perspective, the C100 is closer to an entry-level fun camera and a portable recording device, rather than a traditional imaging performance product. The transparent display allows users to frame shots directly through the camera body, making it suitable for children, light travel, and low-threshold shooting scenarios. 从产品定位看，C100 更接近入门级趣味相机和随身记录设备，而不是传统影像性能产品。透明显示屏让用户可以通过机身直接完成取景，适合儿童、轻旅行和低门槛拍摄场景。

item.title: 曝高德内测 Vibe Coding 产品「袋马」
item.guid: 曝高德内测-Vibe-Coding-产品「袋马」
item.description:
According to 'Dujia' news, Amap is internally testing a Vibe Coding product called 'Daima,' which allows users to generate WeChat mini-programs or native iOS apps by describing their requirements in natural language. 《读佳》消息称，高德正在内测一款名为「袋马」的 Vibe Coding 产品，用户用自然语言描述需求后，可以生成微信小程序或 iOS 原生 App。

The report states that 'Daima' is aimed at users without professional R&D teams, focusing on scenarios such as stores, events, tools, and lightweight business applications. The generated results can run on real devices and support further modification of interfaces and functions through natural language. 报道称，「袋马」面向没有专业研发团队的用户，聚焦门店、活动、工具和轻量业务应用等场景，生成结果可在真机运行，并支持继续通过自然语言修改界面和功能。

item.title: 美的回应空调在欧洲部分渠道售罄
item.guid: 美的回应空调在欧洲部分渠道售罄
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, the European continent has recently experienced extreme heatwaves, and Midea Group's PortaSplit portable split air conditioners have become a hot-selling product locally. Midea responded today, stating that the heatwave has significantly driven sales growth, especially for PortaSplit air conditioners, which have sold out in some sales channels. 据界面新闻报道，欧洲大陆近日遭遇极端热浪，美的集团生产的 PortaSplit 便携式分体空调成为当地热销产品。美的今日回应称，热浪显著带动销售增长，尤其是 PortaSplit 空调，已在部分销售渠道售罄。

The long-term household air conditioner penetration rate in Europe is about 20%, and less than 15% in Western European countries like Germany and France. The report mentioned that factors such as restrictions on installing external units on historical buildings, approval from apartment owners' committees, and high installation fees for professional technicians make portable air conditioners, which require no complex installation and are movable, more suitable for local summer needs. Midea PortaSplit adopts a window sill external mounting design, and the official statement claims users can complete assembly within 10 minutes. The official German price is approximately 699 to 900 Euros. 欧洲家庭空调普及率长期约 20%，德国、法国等西欧国家不足 15%。报道提到，历史保护建筑外墙安装限制、公寓业主委员会审批、专业技师安装费高等因素，让无需复杂安装、可移动的便携式空调更适合当地夏季需求。美的 PortaSplit 采用窗台外挂式设计，官方称用户 10 分钟内可完成组装，德国官方售价约 699 至 900 欧元。

Midea's overseas business head disclosed that in the first half of 2026, Midea's overall air conditioner sales in Western European markets such as Germany, France, Spain, and the UK increased by over 70% year-on-year. PortaSplit alone sold over 60,000 units in the German market in half a year, with an estimated annual sales volume of 200,000 to 300,000 units across Europe. 美的海外业务负责人披露，2026 年上半年，美的在德国、法国、西班牙、英国等西欧市场的空调整体销售额同比增长超过 70%，PortaSplit 单品在德国市场半年销量突破 6 万台，全欧洲预计全年销量达 20 万至 30 万台。

Data from the General Administration of Customs of China shows that in the first half of 2026, China's air conditioner exports to the EU amounted to US$3.76 billion, a year-on-year increase of 43.2%. Exports of installation-free mobile air conditioners saw a year-on-year increase of over 70%. 中国海关总署数据显示，2026 年上半年中国对欧盟空调出口额为 37.6 亿美元，同比增长 43.2%，免安装移动空调出口同比增幅超过 70%。

🔗 Related reading: Chinese air conditioners are selling like hotcakes in Europe, foreigners are so desperate they're using AI to snatch them from scalpers 🔗 相关阅读： 中国空调在欧洲卖爆了，老外急到用 AI 跟黄牛抢货

item.title: 大疆否认 7 月全系涨价传闻
item.guid: 大疆否认-7-月全系涨价传闻
item.description: According to Blue Whale Technology, regarding screenshots circulating on social media claiming 'DJI's full range of products will be repriced starting July 15, 2026, with an increase of 3% to 8%,' DJI responded on June 28th, stating that the news is false and purely a rumor; currently, DJI's official suggested retail prices remain stable, and there are no plans for a full-range price adjustment as rumored online. 据蓝鲸科技报道，针对社交平台流传的「大疆全系产品将于 2026 年 7 月 15 日起调价、涨幅 3% 至 8%」截图，大疆方面 6 月 28 日回应称，消息不实，纯属谣言；目前大疆官方指导价保持稳定，没有网传的全系调价计划。

item.title: CAYE 咖爷科技完成近 4 亿元 B 轮融资
item.guid: CAYE-咖爷科技完成近-4-亿元-B-轮融资
item.description:
According to 36Kr, CAYE Coffee Technology, a commercial fully automatic coffee machine brand, has completed nearly 400 million yuan in Series B financing, led by existing shareholder Meituan Longzhu, with follow-on investments from institutions such as Bairui Capital, Hillhouse Ventures, Su Capital, and Jiabin Capital. The report states that this is currently the largest single financing round in the commercial fully automatic coffee machine sector. 据 36 氪报道，商用全自动咖啡机品牌 CAYE 咖爷科技已完成近 4 亿元 B 轮融资，由老股东美团龙珠领投，柏睿资本、高瓴创投、苏创投、嘉宾资本等机构跟投。报道称，这是目前商用全自动咖啡机赛道规模最大的单笔融资。

Founded in December 2022, CAYE Coffee focuses on re-engineering coffee grinding, powder weight control, tamping, and pressurized extraction processes around its self-developed Bionic Barista system. Its products have entered specialty coffee chains and commercial coffee chain stores, covering over 80 countries and regions worldwide. CAYE 咖爷成立于 2022 年 12 月，围绕自研 Bionic Barista 仿生咖啡师系统重做咖啡研磨、粉重控制、布粉填压和加压萃取等环节，产品已进入精品连锁咖啡和商业连锁咖啡门店，并覆盖全球 80 多个国家和地区。

item.title: 《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》全球票房超越《奥本海默》，成影史最高传记片
item.guid: 《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》全球票房超越《奥本海默》，成影史最高传记片
item.description:
According to Box Office Mojo data, as of yesterday afternoon, Michael Jackson's biopic 'Michael Jackson: The Road to a Superstar' has accumulated a global box office of $977.5 million, officially surpassing 'Oppenheimer' to become the highest-grossing biographical film in cinematic history. 据 Box Office Mojo 数据，截至昨日下午，迈克尔·杰克逊传记片《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》全球累计票房达 9.775 亿美元，正式超越《奥本海默》成为影史票房最高的传记电影。

    North America's cumulative box office is $370.2 million, distributed by Lionsgate;

    The overseas market's cumulative box office is approximately $607.2 million, primarily distributed by Universal Pictures;

  • 中国内地方面，据猫眼专业版数据，该片累计票房约 7132.8 万元人民币（约合 1044 万美元）。

《奥本海默》此前以 9.758 亿美元全球票房保持传记片冠军纪录，《巨星之路》在上映约两个月后完成超越。

此前该片还先后超越《波西米亚狂想曲》（9.11 亿美元），成为影史票房最高音乐传记片。影片开映首周末全球票房约 2.174 亿美元，打破传记片全球开画纪录。

item.title: 同人故事改编电影《爱情假说》公布首支预告，9 月 23 日登陆 Prime Video
item.guid: 同人故事改编电影《爱情假说》公布首支预告，9-月-23-日登陆-Prime-Video
item.description:
由同人小说改编的爱情喜剧电影《爱情假说》（The Love Hypothesis）正式公布首支预告，影片定于今年 9 月 23 日在 Prime Video 上线。

影片由莉莉·莱因哈特与汤姆·贝特曼主演，克莱尔·斯坎伦执导，Amazon/MGM 影业出品。故事讲述博士候选人 Olive 为向好友证明自己能维持一段长期感情，与年轻教授 Adam 假装恋人，两人却在此过程中真正相爱。

该片原著小说由艾莉·黑泽尔伍德创作。她数年前曾在同人创作平台 AO3 发布《星球大战》同人故事《Head Over Feet》，以 Rey 与 Kylo Ren/Ben Solo 为原型人物，后将故事改编为原创小说《爱情假说》出版，最终成为畅销书。
